title: Shattering Fresh Norwegian Fish Sauce Ttukbaegi
description: Romantic dish from Norway that features a delicate balance of fresh fish and flavorful fish sauce, cooked to perfection in a traditional ttukbaegi earthenware pot. This vegan-friendly recipe is a perfect way to impress your partner on a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Norwegian Cod Fillets
ingredients.notes: Fresh and sustainable fish, preferably wild-caught or farmed in Norway.

ingredients.name: Fish Sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality fish sauce that is free from animal products and artificial flavorings.

ingredients.name: Miso Paste
ingredients.notes: Add depth and umami flavor to the dish without any animal products.

ingredients.name: Rice Vinegar
ingredients.notes: Balances the flavors in the dish and adds a touch of acidity.

ingredients.name: Ginger
ingredients.notes: Fresh ginger adds warmth and spice to the dish.

ingredients.name: Korean Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: Spicy kick to the dish, adjust to taste.

ingredients.name: Sesame Oil
ingredients.notes: Add a nutty flavor and aroma to the dish.

ingredients.name: Fresh Cilantro
ingredients.notes: Garnish with fresh cilantro for added freshness and color.

ingredients.name: Rice
ingredients.notes: Cooked white or brown rice for serving.

instructions: Rinse the cod fillets under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.
Heat the sesame oil in the ttukbaegi earthenware pot over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the ginger and sauté for another minute until it starts to soften.
Add the fish sauce, miso paste, rice vinegar, and Korean chili flakes. Stir to combine.
Add the cod fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, until they are cooked through and flake easily with a fork.
Remove the cod from the pot and set it aside to rest.
Strain the cooking liquid and discard any solids.
Return the cooking liquid to the pot and simmer for 2-3 minutes until it has reduced slightly.
Serve the cod with the sauce spooned over the top and steamed rice on the side.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
Cook the rice according to the package instructions and set it aside to keep warm.
